news.headline: Can AI-assisted unmanned vessels be Beijing’s answer to South China Sea patrols?
news.summary:

news.headline: Gaza aid convoy in Libya prepares to head to Gaza
news.summary: The "Soumoud 2" land convoy is preparing to leave Libya to bring aid to Gaza.

news.headline: US planning to criminally indict ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
news.summary: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.

news.headline: Judge declares another mistrial in Harvey Weinstein New York rape case
news.summary: It marks the third time a New York jury has considered the case against the 74-year-old disgraced film mogul.
